economic_notes: Nation holds interests in multiple limited partnerships and corporations including Dunne-za Ventures LP (99.9%), Black Diamond Cygnus LP (50%), West Moberly First Nations Investments Inc. (100%), West Moberly Indigiinet Internet Service Inc. (50%), Six Nations Ventures LP (16.67%), Twin Sisters Native Plants Nursery LP (49.9%), Papawewin Developments LP (99.9%). Agricultural operations including cattle inventory. Golf course operation through 0944996 BC Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Three entities consolidated (West Moberly First Nation Holdings Inc., 0944996 BC Ltd, West Moberly First Nations Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust). Nine entities accounted for by modified equity method. Large deferred contributions of $22.3M primarily from Province of BC ($10.6M) and Industrial Agreements ($5.8M) significantly distort revenue. OSR calculation is negative due to deferred revenue mechanics. Treaty loan payable of $3,278,585 to ISC is interest-free pending treaty settlement. COVID-19 noted as significant event. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Total expenditures per Schedule 4 ($16,709,168) differs from Statement of Financial Activities ($16,022,360) due to amortization inclusion in Schedule 4.
